title: NOAA Education Resource Collections
description: A source card for NOAA education collections on weather, climate, oceans, coasts, data, and marine life.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA Education Resource Collections organize federal science materials by topic. Students can browse ocean and coasts, weather and atmosphere, climate, marine life, freshwater, data resources, and printable activities.

This is a strong nonfiction path for research projects because NOAA connects observations, models, real-time data, and human decisions. It is especially useful for climate impacts, hurricanes, ocean acidification, watersheds, and weather data.

Rights note: NOAA is a US government source, but the portal links to many offices and partner resources. Treat this as a trusted catalog and check item-level rights before mirroring a linked worksheet, image, or dataset.
